languages.text: "Ваше решение — лучшая награда для верного слуги".

traits.locale_text: "Ваше решение — лучшая награда для верного слуги".

languages.translation_comment:
Переход в медотсек

languages.text: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."
languages.original_text: "Ваше решение — лучшая награда для верного слуги".

traits.locale_text: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."
"Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."
"Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."

languages.text: 「忠実な臣下にとって、最大の報酬は主の決断である」
languages.original_text: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."

languages.text: "Kararınız, sadık bir hizmetkâr için en büyük ödüldür."
languages.original_text: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."

traits.locale_text: "Kararınız, sadık bir hizmetkâr için en büyük ödüldür."

languages.text: “您的这一决定是对忠诚仆从最好的嘉奖。”
languages.original_text: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."

traits.locale_text: “您的这一决定是对忠诚仆从最好的嘉奖。”

languages.text: "Eure Entscheidung ist die größte Belohnung für einen treuen Diener."
languages.original_text: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Entscheidung ist die größte Belohnung für einen treuen Diener."

languages.text: « Pour un fidèle serviteur tel que moi, votre décision est la plus belle des récompenses. »
languages.original_text: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."

traits.locale_text: « Pour un fidèle serviteur tel que moi, votre décision est la plus belle des récompenses. »

languages.text: «Su decisión es la mayor recompensa que su fiel sirviente puede esperar».
languages.original_text: "Your decision is the greatest reward for a faithful servant."

traits.locale_text: «Su decisión es la mayor recompensa que su fiel sirviente puede esperar».
